text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 89 

HLTH_HOME_DBTS_CC_IND 

LABEL: Health Home Diabetes State-Reported Chronic Condition Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary had the health home Chronic Condition “Diabetes”; most 
recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: HLTH_HOME_DBTS_CC_IND 

LONG NAME: HLTH_HOME_DBTS_CC_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S):
